CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. LAWRENCE MURRAY, Esq. of Murray & Associates (tel: 415-673-0555) for Plaintiff.
Atty. TARA STEELEY, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of the City of San Francisco Attorney's Office (tel: 415-554-4655) for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued. The Court takes judicial notice as requested by the parties. The Court notes it takes judicial notice, not for the truth of the matter, but for the purpose of what the parties are alleging. Upon conclusion of argument, the court takes the matter under submission. The Court requests counsel Tara Steeley to email a copy of the court reporter's transcript to calendar301@sftc.org .

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Nancy Presant, CSR# 9906 (tel: 510-757-8550 / email: Npresantcsr@gmail.com) =(301/CVA)
